response: Cell type deconvolution (RCTD) requires an annotated single-cell reference dataset to estimate cell type proportions in spot-level data. Since you have confirmed that no reference dataset is available, this task is not feasible at this time. Please obtain or create an annotated single-cell reference dataset (.h5ad file) with cell type labels, then retry the deconvolution task.
query_text: Estimate cell type proportions for each spot without any reference dataset.
